'''Gwig''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] who lived on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]].<ref name="SWE" /> He came of age and received his hood—together with [[Malani]] and [[Mookiee]]—at the [[Festival of Hoods]].<ref name="The Cries of the Trees">{{Ewoks|The Cries of the Trees}}</ref> He was also amongst a group of young Ewoks and woklings to whom [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]] told the story of [[Logray/Legends|Logray]], [[Morag]] and the [[Sunstar/Legends|Sunstar]].<ref name="SvS">{{Ewoks|Sunstar vs. Shadowstone}}</ref> Gwig sought to join older Ewoks on their many adventures.<ref name="SWE" /> He was named for a [[Gwig (legend)|legendary scout]] from Ewok mythology.<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Gwig.jpg|thumb|left|Gwig plush toy]]
Gwig first appeared as one of six 8-inch plush woklings made by [[Kenner Products|Kenner]] as part of their ''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (toy line)|Return of the Jedi]]'' toy line<ref name="Scouting the Galaxy">{{InsiderCite|40|Scouting the Galaxy}}</ref>, and then as a figure in the [[Wicket the Ewok (toy line)|''Wicket the Ewok'']] toy line from the company's Kenner Preschool division.<ref name="Kenner Wicket">{{KennerCite|set=Wicket the Ewok (toy line)|pack=Ewok Family Hut|altlink=http://blog.theswca.com/2017/10/woktots-kenners-preschool-star-wars-toys.html}}</ref>

Gwig's first appearance in fiction was as a background character with no spoken lines in the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] television series. His name appears only on two of [[Nelvana]]'s animation model cels, one of which shows him wearing a green bandana<ref name="Gwig Bandana">{{WebCite|url=https://www.pinterest.es/pin/405605510182371721|text=Star Wars Ewoks Cartoon Animation Production GWIG Model Cel BV297|work=Pinterest|archivedate=20230206152138}}</ref> and the other a blue hood.<ref name="Gwig Hood">{{WebCite|url=https://www.worthpoint.com/worthopedia/star-wars-ewoks-original-production-1892744829|text=STAR WARS EWOKS ORIGINAL PRODUCTION ANIMATION GWIG MODEL CEL #A25195|work=Worthpoint.com|archivedate=20221219184912}}</ref> The blue-hooded design matches the unnamed character in "[[The Cries of the Trees]]." Both versions of Gwig are present in the crowd of young Ewoks in "[[Sunstar vs. Shadowstone]]."
